events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need produce JSON answer. Need reason. Scenario: grounding electrode system, clamp not listed for direct burial. NEC 250.70? Grounding electrode conductors and bonding jumpers connection devices must be listed for the application and suitable for direct burial if buried. Clamp not listed for direct burial is non-compliant, defective installed. Decision fail. Risk high? Grounding integrity corrosion failure could be critical in industrial site. But maybe high. Work stage rough-complete. percent_complete maybe 80. component_conditions installed-defective, non-compliant. value 0 (no numeric). findings: clamp used on grounding electrode conductor/bonding jumper is not listed for direct burial, violates NEC 250.70/250.68. actions: remove unlisted clamp, install listed direct-burial grounding/bonding clamp or exothermic weld, inspect, retest continuity/resistance. references NEC 250.50-250.68, 250.70. Need valid JSON only. Ensure no prose outside.
